extortion.description: he Office for Students (OfS) aims to ensure that all students have a rewarding experience in higher education that enhances their personal and professional lives. It provides resources and guidance on quality assessment, financial sustainability, and student welfare while promoting equal opportunities and student choice. The OfS collaborates with educational institutions to improve standards and support systems in the sector. Their focus includes the well-being of students, financial support, and the overall academic landscape in England.
